# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

1. User should receive a WA message that contains Download link of the app when user clicks on “Continue” CTA on the KFS screen on PhonePe
2. User should receive a WA message that contains Download link of the app when user clicks on “Continue” CTA on the KFS screen on PhonePe
3. When user clicks on WA the user should be redirected to WA with Volt chat open with the following message “Hi, I need Volt Money app link to complete my application": Link: [https://wa.me/919611749097?text=Hi, I need Volt Money app link to complete my application](https://wa.me/919611749097?text=Hi,%20I%20need%20Volt%20Money%20app%20link%20to%20complete%20my%20application)
4. User should receive a WA message when user replies with “Hi, I need Volt Money app link to complete my application”. Message template name: b2b_app_link
5. Setup a slack channel with key steps of the journey to be updated in the slack group.
